instruction: Write a FreeMarker macro `card` with parameters `title` and optional `footer`. Render a div.card containing a header, nested body content, and footer block only when the footer parameter is non-empty. Escape title and footer.
code:
<#-- Macro: card(title, footer="") with nested body --> <#macro card title footer="">

${title?html}

<#nested>
<#if footer?has_content>
${footer?html}
